response.justification: Candidate has 10+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ requirement, with current hands-on work in TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) directly aligned with the role. Strong polyglot background (TS, Java, Python-adjacent, DLang, C++), React/MongoDB/AWS experience, and demonstrated software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development). Minor gaps around Nest.js and Vitest specifically, but the foundation is strong enough to ramp quickly.
strengths: Current AI-agent and MCP tooling experience matches a key required skill
Deep full-stack background with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS
Strong craftsmanship signal: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, workshops, open-source projects
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned in resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience appears dated (pre-2018)
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may indicate less recent depth in primary stack frameworks
